title: Grilled Tzimmes
description: A simple and delicious side dish featuring sweet carrots and prunes, grilled to perfection. Tzimmes is a traditional Jewish dish that's perfect for springtime and summer gatherings.
instructions: Peel and slice the carrots into 1/4-inch thick rounds.
In a small bowl, mix together the brown sugar, cinnamon, ginger, and salt.
Add the prunes to the sugar mixture and toss to coat.
Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking.
Add the carrot slices to the grill and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, or until tender.
After the carrots are cooked, brush the grill with oil again.
Add the prune mixture to the grill and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, or until caramelized.
Serve the tzimmes hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
